# Planning Instructions

**Read first:** [dfd-first.instructions.md](dfd-first.instructions.md) — Universal DFD-driven decomposition principle.

## Workflow


### Step 2: Decompose Stories into Tasks
When decomposing features into tasks:

1. Reference [DFD (Data Flow Diagram)](../../docs/dfd_level0.md) for data boundaries and contracts
2. Review [User Stories](../../docs/user_stories.md) for acceptance criteria
3. Check [Technical Spec](../../docs/technical.md) for architectural patterns
4. Use the **kanban-workflow skill** to understand task file format and structure
5. See [plan.agent.md](.github/agents/plan.agent.md) for the DFD-first planning methodology
